title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL systems, including best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The course is offered through Harvard University via edX and other platforms for certificate completion.
